description.zh-Hans: 生成带硬边轮廓、菌盖遮挡、菌褶暗部和离散斑点的RPG像素蘑菇，适用于奇幻与地牢场景。
description.en: Generates RPG pixel mushrooms with hard outlines, layered caps, dark undersides, and discrete spots.

triggers.zh-Hans: 蘑菇, 菌类, 真菌, 地牢, 奇幻植物
triggers.en: mushroom, fungus, fungi, dungeon flora, fantasy plant

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成风格化蘑菇图案，用于奇幻场景、地牢装饰或自然生态。
exampleUsage.en: Generate stylized mushroom clusters for fantasy scenes, dungeon decoration, or natural biomes.
